overall.description: First-person gameplay footage exploring an institutional facility with padded isolation cells. The player character moves through a dimly lit cell with a distressed occupant, exits into a green-tiled corridor, encounters a guard, and enters a second padded cell containing another occupant before exiting back to the hallway.

scene_state.functional_zone: padded isolation cell with wall drawings

events.description: approaching and opening the glass door to exit the padded cell

agents.ego_description: moving around the confined padded cell, observing the distressed occupant in the corner, then walking toward the exit door

notable_agents.action: sitting in the corner with knees drawn up, head down, appearing distressed

entered.detail: white padded wall tiles covering the room surfaces
simple bed with white sheets and red blanket
crude sketches and symbols drawn on the padded walls
glass door with metal frame leading to the hallway

segments.scene_description: The camera explores a small padded isolation cell with white tiled walls covered in crude drawings. A distressed occupant sits in the far corner while the camera moves around the bed with red bedding, eventually approaching the glass door to exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: green-tiled institutional corridor with numbered doors

events.description: exiting the padded cell into the green-tiled hallway

agents.ego_description: moving through the institutional hallway past metal carts and a purple vending machine

entered.detail: institutional green ceramic tile walls with white lower sections
bright purple vending machine with illuminated display
doors marked with numbers 7, 8, and 9 along the corridor

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a green-tiled institutional hallway with fluorescent lighting. The camera moves past a metal utility cart and a distinctive purple vending machine, approaching a series of numbered doors including door 7.

events.description: guard in camouflage uniform exits door 7 into the hallway

agents.ego_description: approaching the guard who just emerged from door 7

notable_agents.action: exiting door 7 and standing in the hallway wearing camouflage uniform with yellow boots

entered.detail: open door with yellow number 7 sign above it
empty metal shelving unit against the wall

segments.scene_description: A guard emerges from door 7 into the hallway. The camera approaches the guard, who stands near the open doorway wearing a camouflage uniform with distinctive yellow boots, while the institutional green walls and numbered doors remain visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: second padded isolation cell with window

events.description: entering the second padded cell through door 7
occupant on bed reacts by looking up and moving hands

agents.ego_description: entering the second padded cell and approaching the occupant sitting on the bed

notable_agents.action: sitting on bed with head in hands, then looking up as camera approaches

entered.detail: white padded wall tiles in the second cell
bed with white mattress and red blanket

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a second padded cell through door 7, revealing another distressed occupant sitting on a bed. The room has similar white padded walls but includes a small window showing darkness outside. The occupant reacts by looking up as the camera approaches closely.

events.description: exiting the second padded cell back into the hallway

agents.ego_description: moving back toward the door and exiting the cell, observing the guard in the hallway

notable_agents.action: standing in the hallway visible through the glass door

entered.detail: glass door with metal handle and red lock mechanism
green tiled hallway walls visible through the door

segments.scene_description: The camera retreats from the occupant and exits the second cell, returning to the green-tiled hallway. Through the glass door, the guard remains visible standing in the corridor as the segment ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from the claustrophobic interior of a padded cell into a sterile institutional corridor and back into another isolation room. It begins by exploring a small cell with white padded walls covered in crude drawings and a distressed occupant, moving past a bed with red bedding toward the glass exit. As the camera steps out, the environment shifts to a green-tiled hallway illuminated by fluorescent lights, passing a metal utility cart and a purple vending machine before approaching a guard in camouflage and yellow boots standing by door 7. The scene then transitions inside a second padded cell, where the camera closes in on another occupant sitting beneath a small window showing darkness outside. Finally, the camera retreats from the room and exits back into the hallway, leaving the guard visible through the glass door.
